{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"api_error_status":null,"duration_ms":31024,"duration_api_ms":22454,"ttft_ms":1828,"ttft_stream_ms":1403,"time_to_request_ms":80,"num_turns":5,"result":"Three pluggable I/O schedulers registered in this tree (block/mq-deadline.c, block/bfq-iosched.c, block/kyber-iosched.c), plus the implicit "none" (no elevator — requests go straight from software queue to hardware dispatch via blk-mq, no reordering/merging policy).

| Scheduler | Philosophy | Dispatch entry point |
|---|---|---|
| **mq-deadline** | Bounds per-request latency by enforcing a hard deadline per read/write while still batching sequential requests for throughput, with priority classes to protect higher I/O priorities. | `dd_dispatch_request()` — block/mq-deadline.c:452 |
| **bfq** (Budget Fair Queueing) | Proportional-share fairness: gives each process/cgroup a fair, low-latency slice of disk time via per-queue "budgets," favoring interactive/soft-real-time tasks over bulk throughput. | `bfq_dispatch_request()` — block/bfq-iosched.c:5298 (delegates to `__bfq_dispatch_request()` at bfq-iosched.c:5157) |
| **kyber** | Token-bucket rate limiting split by request domain (read/write/discard/other), auto-tuning queue depths to hit a target latency percentile rather than static deadlines. | `kyber_dispatch_request()` — block/kyber-iosched.c:789 |
| **none** | No scheduling policy — dispatches requests essentially FIFO straight to the hardware queue; relies on device/hardware (e.g. NVMe multi-queue) for ordering. | No elevator dispatch fn; handled directly by blk-mq's own dispatch path (`blk_mq_dispatch_rq_list` etc.) since there's no `elevator_type` registered for it. |","stop_reason":"end_turn","session_id":"0b5a7d96-b58e-4100-bb38-6b21fee26af4","total_cost_usd":0.27430830000000006,"usage":{"input_tokens":10,"cache_creation_input_tokens":29677,"cache_read_input_tokens":247071,"output_tokens":1473,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":29677,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"not_available","iterations":[{"input_tokens":2,"output_tokens":608,"cache_read_input_tokens":58226,"cache_creation_input_tokens":430,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":430},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"modelUsage":{"claude-sonnet-5":{"inputTokens":10,"outputTokens":1473,"cacheReadInputTokens":247071,"cacheCreationInputTokens":29677,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":0.27430830000000006,"contextWindow":1000000,"maxOutputTokens":64000}},"permission_denials":[],"terminal_reason":"completed","fast_mode_state":"off","uuid":"37110656-efd2-45eb-8606-59a18603fb5c"}
